notes: Not Road B candidate (gap unit=sqft, HD SKU=gallon — coverage-rate conversion required) | Semi-transparent deck stain Behr Premium ~$38/gal at 250 sqft/gal = $0.15/sqft. Solid Cabot/PPG $45-55/gal at 200 sqft = $0.22-$0.28. US 2024-26 per-sqft material range: $0.12 (semi-transparent budget) to $0.30 (solid premium). Source: HD Behr/Cabot gallon pricing ÷ coverage rate.

Shifted from Road B (no SKU for labor) | Deck stain labor incl. prep (light sand/wash), 2-coat stain application, clean-up. US 2024-26 range: $1.00/sqft (production residential, single-coat re-stain) to $3.00/sqft (full prep incl. stripping, 2 coats premium, railings). Source: RSMeans + painter contractor surveys.

Shifted from Road B (Haiku refused SKU 314107181 on kit-vs-gallon pedantry) | HD sells garage epoxy primarily as 2-car kits (240 oz / ~1.875 gal covers ~500 sqft). Standalone 1-gal epoxy exists (Quikrete EpoxyShield 1-gal, Rust-Oleum single-part). US 2024-26 per-gallon range: $40 (Quikrete water-based) to $100 (Rust-Oleum RockSolid Polycuramine premium). Kits normalize around $70-$80/gal. Source: HD epoxy SKU list.

Shifted from Road B (no SKU for labor) | Epoxy floor install labor: diamond-grind prep, crack repair, primer, base coat, flake broadcast (optional), 2-part polyurethane topcoat. US 2024-26 range: $2.00/sqft (basic 1-coat over acid-etched slab) to $7.00/sqft (full prep, flake, polyaspartic topcoat). Source: Concrete Network + epoxy contractor surveys.

Shifted from Road B (INSTALLED bundle — no HD SKU for strip/prime/paint service) | Full cabinet door refinish: remove, strip/sand, prime, 2 coats cabinet-grade paint (Emerald Urethane / Benjamin Moore Advance), rehang. US 2024-26 range: $100/door (basic paint, no strip, spray booth production) to $250/door (full strip, brush/spray, premium enamel, on-site). Source: cabinet refinisher surveys.

Shifted from Road B (no SKU for labor) | Wallpaper removal: score, steam/solvent, strip, wash off adhesive residue, skim minor paper tears. US 2024-26 range: $1.00/sqft (single-layer peelable, light adhesive) to $5.00/sqft (multi-layer, oil-sealed plaster, heavy adhesive, includes prep). Source: paperhanger contractor surveys.
